reviews.comment:
Cuando pueden te cobran con cualquier medio pero priorizan la plata física y te ponen escusas con medios  digitales.

(Translated by Google)
When they can, they charge you by any means, but they prioritize physical money and make excuses for it with digital means.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuLWZueDlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hoy cargue infinia a las 6 aproximadamente, pague 20 mil con modo, y me sale Oca chascomus, nada que ver, perdí  el descuento, creo que me dieron otra cuenta otra pagar

(Translated by Google)
Today I topped up my Infinia account around 6 AM, paid 20,000 pesos with the discount, and it shows Oca Chascomús, which is completely unrelated. I lost the discount; I think they gave me a different account and I have to pay again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNueXRtMXpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El sr q atiende no da a basto siempre esta solo...y si hay otra persona trabajando con el atiende a quien quiere.
Y lo que más me enoja 😡 es que si SOS VECINO O VAS CON BIDON TE ATIENEDEN ANTES !!
sino cgate esperando  nos paso muchas veces estar más de 15 minutos para cargar porque vienen amigos,vecinos etc.

(Translated by Google)
The guy who works there is overwhelmed and always alone... and if there's someone else working with him, he serves whoever he wants.

And what really pisses me off 😡 is that if you're a neighbor or you're carrying a jerrycan, you get served faster!!
Otherwise, you're screwed. It's happened to us many times, waiting more than 15 minutes to fill up because friends, neighbors, etc., are coming in.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4b0w2NWhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El servicio en el ACA San Clemente es óptimo,taller mecánico en mano de especialistas altamente recomendable y confiables,desde ya mil gracias por solucionar los problemas de mí Renault Fluence.

(Translated by Google)
The service at ACA San Clemente is excellent, the mechanics at the workshop are highly recommended and reliable specialists, thank you very much for solving the problems with my Renault Fluence.
